positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a celestial journey. A charming, detailed silhouette of a young astronaut floating past a nebula-filled ringed planet and trailing comet. The background is a blend of deep indigo, vibrant cosmic turquoise, and soft lavender gradients. Scattered amongst the cosmic dust are stylized constellations rendered in glowing gold linework and small, detailed planets. The overall style is neo-vintage scientific sketch meets modern children's book illustration, emphasizing clean lines, high contrast, and graphic impact suitable for an apparel print. Centered, symmetrical composition. Full body, high detail, 8k quality.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, artifacts, low resolution, watermarks, text, signature, dirty, cropped, asymmetrical, poor anatomy, ugly, noise, grain
